recommendations.title: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark
recommendations.overview: A young girl sent to live with her father and his new girlfriend discovers creatures in her new home who want to claim her as one of their own.

recommendations.title: Mother Joan of the Angels
recommendations.overview: A Polish priest arrives at a convent hoping to save the Mother Superior who is supposedly possessed by eight demons.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Candy
recommendations.overview: A struggling painter is possessed by satanic forces after he and his young family move into their dream home in rural Texas.

recommendations.title: House
recommendations.overview: Roger Cobb, a divorced horror novelist coming to terms with the disappearance of his young son, inherits an old mansion home to malevolent supernatural residents.

recommendations.title: Home Sweet Home: Rebirth
recommendations.overview: When a city is overrun with a demonically-possessed crowd, a cop must find the source of evil to save his family.

recommendations.title: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A young boy tells three stories of horror to distract a witch who plans to eat him.

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Nahuala
recommendations.overview: Leo San Juan, an insecure child of nine years old, lives eternally frightened by horror stories that Nando tells his older brother. Within these stories it is 'The Legend of Nahuala', according to which, an old abandoned Casona is possessed by the sp

recommendations.title: Abracadabra
recommendations.overview: A housewife struggles with her husband after he is possessed by a ghost.

recommendations.title: Above the Shadows
recommendations.overview: A young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible must find her way back with the help of the one man who can see her.

recommendations.title: Gaia
recommendations.overview: In the depths of an ancient forest, something has been growing. Something older than humanity itself, and perhaps greater too. When a park ranger discovers a man and his son living wild, she stumbles onto a secret that is about to change the world.
